name: resend
description: Resend email workflows for agents via CLI skills and MCP tooling. After install, run: bash ~/plugins/resend/scripts/bootstrap.sh

interface.shortDescription: Send and manage email with Resend
interface.longDescription: Use Resend via both MCP tools and CLI workflows to send emails, manage audiences, domains, broadcasts, templates, and webhooks. After installation, run `bash ~/plugins/resend/scripts/bootstrap.sh` in a terminal to verify/install CLI and capture RESEND_API_KEY.
defaultPrompt: Send a transactional email with Resend
Set up and verify a Resend domain
